what services do you provide?: ADAPS offers a comprehensive suite of IT consulting, digital transformation, and custom software solutions tailored to business needs.
how do i start a new project?: You can request a consultation through our contact form or reach out directly to our sales team to schedule a discovery call.
which industries do you work with?: We serve a wide range of sectors, including healthcare, finance, logistics, and manufacturing, providing specialized digital strategies.
what is the typical project timeline?: Timelines vary by scope, but we typically move from discovery to delivery in 3 to 6 months using an agile, iterative approach.
how does ongoing support work?: Post-delivery, we offer tiered maintenance packages including security updates, technical support, and performance optimization.
how do you handle data security?: We employ industry-standard encryption, strict access controls, and adhere to global confidentiality practices for all client data.
how is pricing determined?: Pricing is based on project complexity, required resources, and delivery timelines, provided as a detailed quote after discovery.
how can i contact the sales team?: Our sales team can be reached via the 'Contact Us' page on our website or through our official LinkedIn company profile.
do you work with startups or enterprises: We partner with both high-growth startups needing rapid scaling and established enterprises undergoing digital modernization.
what makes your approach different?: Our edge lies in decades of deep industry experience combined with a customer-centric process that ensures technical solutions drive real business value.
